spec_match.rationale: Reference block now illustrates the destination manifest's id and migrate_from fields plus the old origin's allow_migration association schema.

interactive.rationale: Good. Contains an interactive live probe capability audit checking system status and a comparison toggler panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the updated parent details for migrate_from, allow_migration, optional migrate_to, same-site limits, and behavior modes.

edge_cases.rationale: Details same-site subdomain moves, path cleanup with stable IDs, redirect-backed install_url discovery, and forced migration behavior without suggesting unsupported cross-site migrations.

references.rationale: Includes the canonical tracking ChromeStatus link under see also references.

design_system.rationale: Sleek split side-by-side layout grids, borders, and clean tables.

summary: Re-reviewed after replacing the obsolete migration reference with the current Chrome 150 migrate_from / allow_migration model.
